headline: Ultima Genomics releases groundbreaking TRACERx MRD data showing ppmSeq performance and unveils clinical progress of whole genome sequencing at inaugural global MRD Symposium at AACR 2026
summary: Ultima Genomics, a developer of an innovative, ultra-high throughput sequencing architecture today announced key milestones for its ppmSeq® technology with a growing body of evidence from data presented across six abstracts, including an oral session and a plenary session at the 2026 AACR Annual Meeting in San Diego, taking place April 17–22, 2026. Highlighting the program will be initial TRACERx MRD data showcasing the performance of ppmSeq relative to ultrasensitive bespoke panels. Data from c
